description: Validate a clinical case report against CARE guidelines: section checklist, HIPAA identifier scan, word count and reference count (read-only).
rules: read-only — never edits the input report
checks the 12 CARE sections via regex over the file content
also flags obvious HIPAA identifiers, word count vs the 1500-3000 range, and reference count
JSON validation report written to record_store; the porter never fails the step on low compliance
usage: Set REPORT_FILE (a case report .md/.txt). Output: care_validation.json.
limitation: Regex heuristics only — section detection and HIPAA scanning are advisory, not a substitute for human review. Requires python3 (stdlib only).
